cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)

project("KleidiCV" CXX)

add_subdirectory(kleidicv)
add_subdirectory(kleidicv_thread)
add_subdirectory(examples/C)
add_subdirectory(test)
add_subdirectory(benchmark)
